narrative:
Cols 82-L (precinct in Franklin County) has 2,107 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.8 percentage points.
